title: Barista Global Group is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Barista Global Group is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Barista Global Group in Lucknow is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Barista Global Group:
Barista Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Barista Global Group!
